Legal.termsIntro: Please read these Terms of Service carefully before using our platform. By using our services, you agree to be bound by these terms.
Legal.useOfServiceContent: You are permitted to use the service only for lawful purposes and in accordance with these terms.
Legal.agreementPre: By using our services, you expressly agree to all the terms and conditions stated above.
Legal.communityContent: We believe in building a respectful and safe community for all users.
Legal.privacyIntro: We take your privacy seriously. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal information.
Legal.dataCollectionContent: We collect information you provide directly when registering, as well as information we collect automatically when you use the service.
Legal.infoUsageContent: We use your information to provide and improve the service, communicate with you, and ensure platform security.
Legal.cookiesContent: We use cookies to improve your experience on the platform. You can control these settings through your browser.

Errors.CSRF_ERROR: Security error: invalid request. Please refresh the page and try again.
Errors.USER_SIGNIN_ERROR: Invalid email or password. Please check your credentials and try again.
Errors.USER_SIGNUP_ERROR: Failed to create account. Please try again later.
Errors.USER_ALREADY_EXISTS: An account with this email already exists. Please sign in instead.
Errors.RATE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED: Too many attempts. Please wait 15 minutes before trying again.
Errors.UNEXPECTED_ERROR: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
Errors.TOKEN_EXPIRED: Reset token has expired. Please request a new one.
Errors.TOKEN_INVALID: Reset token is invalid. Please request a new one.
Errors.MFA_VERIFY_FAILED: Invalid verification code. Please try again.
Errors.MFA_SETUP_FAILED: Failed to set up two-factor authentication.
Errors.EMAIL_SEND_FAILED: Failed to send email. Please try again later.
